final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a brand named "RAN QIU" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" aesthetic with "极简主义", "自然诗意", "温暖治愈" mood — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-wash minimalism, MUJI brand identity heritage, 侘寂 visual philosophy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include ample negative space, shallow depth-of-field framing
Subject: must include the brand wordmark "RAN QIU" as the focal element, combined with natural elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with golden hour lighting — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic, tranquil atmosphere with golden hour direction — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a warm, natural surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the brand color hex values exactly
Avoid:
